name: Coconut ICE

ingredients.item: raspberries and 2 small chunks of mango per popsicle mold
coconut palm sugar per popsicle mold

method: Place the mango chunks and frozen raspberries in each mold, and fill the molds up with coconut water. Sprinkle with coconut palm sugar, and put the molds in the freezer for about 6 hours.
